author: NETWORG
name: Power Platform: Custom API Endpoint
description: Creates a Dataverse Custom API: customapi.xml + customapirequestparameter.xml (string input) + customapiresponseproperty.xml (string output). Use when you need a callable Dataverse action/function via SDK or Web API.

SolutionRootPath.description: Relative path from the project folder (.csproj) to the folder containing unpacked Dataverse solution files (Other/, Entities/, OptionSets/). Use '.' if solution files are directly in the project folder, or a subfolder name like 'Declarations'. Do not use 'Entities' or 'Other' — those are subdirectories inside the solution metadata root.

CustomizationPrefix.description: The customization prefix for the publisher (e.g. 'contoso').

ApiLogicalName.description: The logical name of the custom API without the prefix (e.g. 'MyCustomApi').

DisplayName.description: The display name for the custom API.

Description.description: The description for the custom API.
